qa_pairs.task_instruction: I removed a vent to paint behind it. Which image shows me holding the white rectangular cover?
I need to clean the paint off my roller. Which image shows the roller being rinsed in a bucket of water?
I'm taking a break to drink water. Where is the black bottle with the red clip being held near the window?
It's getting dark. Which image shows the red work light turned on and sitting on the floor?
I need to reach high places. Which image shows a top-down view of me holding the silver platform ladder?
I want to use the airless sprayer. Where is it sitting on the drop cloth near the wall with blue tape?
I am assembling my painting tool. Which image shows me holding the handle and metal cage separately?
